name: tencent-cfw
description: OctoBus package for Tencent Cloud Firewall (CFW) ACL-based IP block/unblock and rule list APIs.

Tencent_CFW.Tencent_CFW/BlockIP.name: block-ip
Tencent_CFW.Tencent_CFW/BlockIP.description: Block IP addresses via CFW access control rules.

Tencent_CFW.Tencent_CFW/UnblockIP.name: unblock-ip
Tencent_CFW.Tencent_CFW/UnblockIP.description: Unblock IP addresses via CFW access control rule deletion.
